message:
chore(engine): rustfmt formatting fixes and Box<DoctorArgs> clippy fix in frankenctl

frankenctl.rs:
- Reorder use-statement imports to satisfy rustfmt (alphabetical within
  braces)
- Box DoctorArgs in CommandSpec::Doctor variant to reduce enum size
  (clippy::large_enum_variant)
- Collapse single-expression if/else blocks onto one line per rustfmt

frankenctl_cli.rs:
- Reformat multi-line assert! expressions per rustfmt 2024+ style

safe_mode_startup.rs:
- Reorder use imports per rustfmt
- Reformat multi-line assert! expressions per rustfmt 2024+ style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
